reviews.comment:
Hoy domingo particularmente  muy sucio. Todos los cestos rebalsando de basura los del baño y los de afuera. No había papel higiénico. El baño  de mujeres le faltaba limpieza. Me extrañó verlo así

(Translated by Google)
Today, Sunday, was particularly dirty. All the trash cans were overflowing, both in the bathroom and outside. There was no toilet paper. The women's restroom was filthy. I was surprised to see it like that.
